items.title: 7月23日 GitHub趋势日榜
items.summary: 7月23日 GitHub趋势日榜，Top 10 项目涵盖 TypeScript、Rust、Python 等，今日社区最受关注的开源项目。
items.detail:
koala73/worldmonitor - Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface
ruvnet/RuView - π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
ayghri/i-have-adhd - A skill for your coding agent to stop it from burying the answer. ADHD-friendly output.
schollz/croc - Easily and securely send things from one computer to another 🐊 📦
likec4/likec4 - Visualize, collaborate, and evolve the software architecture with always actual and live diagrams from your code
chrislgarry/Apollo-11 - Original Apollo 11 Guidance Computer (AGC) source code for the command and lunar modules.
jamiepine/voicebox - The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.
diegosouzapw/OmniRoute - Never stop coding. Free MIT AI gateway: one endpoint, 278+ providers (90+ free), 500+ models — Kimi, Claude, GPT, OpenAI, Gemini, GLM, DeepSeek, MiniMax. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, Cline & Copilot. Quota-aware auto-fallback, RTK+Caveman compression saves 15-95% tokens, MCP/A2A, Desktop/PWA. Built by 500+ contributors
shiyu-coder/Kronos - Kronos: A Foundation Model for the Language of Financial Markets
ComposioHQ/awesome-claude-skills - A curated list of awesome Claude Skills, resources, and tools for customizing Claude AI workflows

repos.name: koala73/worldmonitor
repos.description: Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface
repos.chinese_summary: 实时全球情报监控面板，集成 AI 驱动的新闻聚合、地缘政治监测和基础设施追踪，提供统一态势感知界面。
repos.solves_what: 解决了信息过载环境下缺乏统一监控工具的问题，让分析师和研究人员能在一个界面中追踪全球动态。

repos.name: ruvnet/RuView
repos.description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
repos.chinese_summary: 利用普通 WiFi 信号实现实时空间感知、生命体征监测和存在检测，无需摄像头即可感知环境。
repos.solves_what: 解决了隐私敏感场景下的环境感知需求，用 WiFi 信号替代摄像头实现无接触式监测。

repos.name: ayghri/i-have-adhd
repos.description: A skill for your coding agent to stop it from burying the answer. ADHD-friendly output.
repos.chinese_summary: 一个编程 Agent 技能插件，帮助 AI 代码助手输出简洁直接的答案，避免冗长解释。
repos.solves_what: 解决了 AI 编程助手回答过于冗长、核心答案被埋没的问题，提供 ADHD 友好的精简输出模式。

repos.name: schollz/croc
repos.description: Easily and securely send things from one computer to another 🐊 📦
repos.chinese_summary: 一款命令行文件传输工具，支持在任意两台电脑之间安全、便捷地传输文件和文件夹。
repos.solves_what: 解决了跨设备文件传输的复杂性，无需注册账号或云存储，端到端加密确保安全性。

repos.name: likec4/likec4
repos.description: Visualize, collaborate, and evolve the software architecture with always actual and live diagrams from your code
repos.chinese_summary: 从代码自动生成、协作编辑和持续演进软件架构图，保持图表与代码同步更新。
repos.solves_what: 解决了架构文档容易过时的问题，通过代码驱动的方式让架构图始终反映最新实现。

repos.name: chrislgarry/Apollo-11
repos.description: Original Apollo 11 Guidance Computer (AGC) source code for the command and lunar modules.
repos.chinese_summary: 阿波罗 11 号登月任务的原始导航计算机（AGC）源代码，涵盖指令舱和登月舱的飞行软件。
repos.solves_what: 为航天史和计算机科学爱好者提供了珍贵的历史资料，展示了早期航天软件工程的精妙设计。

repos.name: jamiepine/voicebox
repos.description: The open-source AI voice studio. Clone, dictate, create.
repos.chinese_summary: 开源 AI 语音工作站，支持语音克隆、语音转文字和语音创作等功能。
repos.solves_what: 为内容创作者提供一站式 AI 语音处理工具，无需依赖商业平台即可完成语音克隆和生成。

repos.name: diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
repos.description: Never stop coding. Free MIT AI gateway: one endpoint, 278+ providers (90+ free), 500+ models — Kimi, Claude, GPT, OpenAI, Gemini, GLM, DeepSeek, MiniMax. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, Cline & Copilot. Quota-aware auto-fallback, RTK+Caveman compression saves 15-95% tokens, MCP/A2A, Desktop/PWA. Built by 500+ contributors
repos.chinese_summary: 免费开源的 AI 网关，一个端点支持 278+ 提供商和 500+ 模型，兼容 Claude Code、Codex、Cursor 等工具。
repos.solves_what: 解决了开发者需要对接多个 AI 服务提供商的复杂性，提供统一接口简化 AI 应用开发。

repos.name: shiyu-coder/Kronos
repos.description: Kronos: A Foundation Model for the Language of Financial Markets
repos.chinese_summary: 金融市场语言的基础模型，专注于理解和分析金融市场的文本和数据。
repos.solves_what: 解决了通用大模型在金融领域理解不足的问题，为量化分析和金融研究提供专业模型支持。

repos.name: ComposioHQ/awesome-claude-skills
repos.description: A curated list of awesome Claude Skills, resources, and tools for customizing Claude AI workflows
repos.chinese_summary: 精选的 Claude 技能和资源列表，汇总自定义 Claude AI 工作流的工具和最佳实践。
repos.solves_what: 帮助开发者快速发现和学习 Claude 的扩展能力，降低 AI 工作流定制的学习门槛。
